name: Easy Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Instant potato flakes or Potato buds
recipeInstructions: In a large saucepan, melt the butter. Saute the onions until golden. Add the potatoes, carrots, water, salt, pepper, and dillweed. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until the potatoes are tender (about 30 minutes, or longer if you prefer creamy). Stir in the milk and parsley and heat until hot, but not boiling. Stir in the potato flakes during the last few minutes of cooking.
